/usr/bin/c++  -g -Wall -pthread -g CMakeFiles/pd_server.dir/src/pd_server/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pd_server.dir/src/pd_server/pd_server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pd_server.dir/src/pd_server/pd_service.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pd_server.dir/src/pd_server/shard_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pd_server.dir/common.pb.cc.o CMakeFiles/pd_server.dir/kv_rpc.pb.cc.o CMakeFiles/pd_server.dir/pd_rpc.pb.cc.o CMakeFiles/pd_server.dir/raft_rpc.pb.cc.o -o ../bin/pd_server   -L/home/hsj/build/release-install-cpp11/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/hsj/build/release-install-cpp11/lib -lmuduo_net -lmuduo_base /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libprotobuf.so -lpthread
